intro: Gothofreda microphylla, also known as Chilean guanabira or Chilean coral tree, is a flowering plant species native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis, ulcers, and skin irritations.
